hooks.command: if ($env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT -match '(?i)(^|[\\/])\.env(\.local)?(?![\w.])') { Write-Output 'BLOCKED: Direct edits to .env files are not allowed. Edit .env.example instead.'; exit 1 } else { exit 0 }
Set-Location 'C:\Users\Owner\Desktop\SRJ\App'; $output = & corepack pnpm typecheck 2>&1; if ($null -ne $output) { $output | Select-Object -Last 20 }; exit 0
